overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic city during golden hour. The journey transitions from urban highways with construction cranes and glass towers to a scenic waterfront promenade featuring distinctive neon-lit architecture and calm waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban highway with elevated ramps

events.description: futuristic silver sedan overtakes on the left side
dark SUV passes by on the right side of the road
vehicle navigates a gentle right curve on the highway ramp

agents.ego_description: driving through futuristic city streets, navigating traffic and curved highway ramps with construction cranes visible on skyline

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan overtaking the ego vehicle on the left
dark SUV passing by on the right side of the road

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with reflective facade on the left side of the highway
elevated concrete highway ramp structure ahead with vehicles traveling on it
futuristic orange-topped street light pole alongside the road
multiple construction cranes mounted on top of distant skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive along a futuristic urban highway during golden hour. The camera passes modern glass office towers and construction cranes while navigating moderate traffic, including sedans and SUVs overtaking on both sides. The road curves gently to the right as it approaches an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront highway with overpass and pier structures

events.description: urban highway opens up to reveal waterfront and large body of water on the right
road curves significantly bringing the water view from right to left side of frame
passing under large concrete overpass structure with metal railings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: cruising along the waterfront road with water visible, passing under overpasses and alongside metal railings

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the waterfront pathway in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure spanning across the water with vehicles on it
calm body of water reflecting the golden hour sunlight, visible beyond the guardrails
wooden pier structures extending into the water with support pillars visible
concrete overpass that the vehicle passes underneath, casting shadows on the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from urban highway to waterfront as the body of water comes into view on the right. The vehicle passes under a large concrete overpass and continues along the curved road, which brings the water to the left side. Wooden piers extend into the calm water, and a distant amusement park structure is visible across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with neon advertisements and elevated transit

events.description: large building with green facade and 02 signage comes into prominent view on the right
yellow sports car drives past on the right side of the promenade

agents.ego_description: driving along the waterfront promenade at moderate speed, passing pedestrians and neon-lit buildings while maintaining view of the water

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the waterfront pathway
yellow sports car driving alongside the promenade on the right

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with green and orange industrial facade featuring large white 02 numerals
massive curved digital screen displaying Japanese text and advertisements in purple and white
metal safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the distinctive building with 02 signage dominating the right side, covered in large digital billboards with Japanese text. The vehicle continues along the waterfront promenade with metal railings on the left and the water beyond. A yellow sports car passes by on the right, and pedestrians walk ahead on the pathway as the camera moves under the elevated transit structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a dense urban highway into a scenic waterfront promenade during the golden hour. It begins by navigating moderate traffic amidst towering glass office buildings and construction cranes, following a gentle curve toward an elevated overpass. As the vehicle passes under the concrete structure, the urban landscape opens up to reveal a calm body of water, with the road curving to bring wooden piers and a distant amusement park into view. The scene then shifts toward a vibrant promenade dominated by a massive building featuring digital billboards and Japanese signage, while a yellow sports car streaks past. Finally, the camera glides along metal railings beside the water, passing pedestrians before moving under an elevated transit structure.
